renewal_risk_reason: budget cut and evaluation of alternative solutions
raw_note:
3/15 acct 1001 - BritePath Solutions (sic) call. No show for the third 
time this quarter. Their admin told me the team has been pulled into a CMS evaluation 
project led by their CTO. Budget was cut 20% across all SaaS vendors.

renewal_risk_reason: mid-cycle price increase and poor communication with billing team
raw_note:
3/28 Pinacle Media (acct 1004)
They're fine on the product side but the billing team is furious about the mid-cycle 
price increase. Threatened to go to Contentful. I've offered to set up a call with 
our finance team but they haven't responded. Two missed QBRs in a row.

4/5 - Zenith Publishing (#1007)
Renewl conversation started. They want a 30% discount or they walk. Current ARR is 
high but margin is already thin. Editor performance on their 50k+ entry library is 
painful and they know it. Competitor POC with Kontent.ai is apparently already underway.
CRO was cc'd on the last email thread which is never a good sign.

renewal_risk_reason: potential platform change due to merger
raw_note:
3/18 orion education (1009)
They love the product but are merging with another ed-tech company that uses WordPress.
Unclear which platform survives. Decision expected by May. Their champion (Director 
of Content) is nervous about her own role post-merger. She's been our main advocate.

renewal_risk_reason: technical issues with locale management and missing fix in newer version
raw_note:
3/26 skyline travel (1011)
They're expanding internationally which is great, but struggling with our locale 
management. Filed 3 tickets about locale fallback behavior. On SDK v4.0 so they 
missed the fix in v4.2. Could go either way on renewal. They asked to talk to PM.

renewal_risk_reason: contract review due to acquisition and SLA requirements
raw_note:
4/8 evergreen media 1015
Product is fine, team is fine, but their parent company got acquired and all vendor 
contracts are under review. New procurement team is asking for enterprise-level 
SLAs on their Growth plan pricing. It's a negotiation game.

4/9 Northstar Logistics
account 1016 -- they barely use the product. 2 active users out of 15 seats. 
most content was migrated but nobody adopted the new workflow. classic 
shelfware situation. Their IT director told me they'd rather downgrade to Starter 
than pay full price for something they don't use. not churn per se but 
significant ARR contraction risk.

renewal_risk_reason: rocky CSM relationship and customer request for new CSM
raw_note:
4/10 pacific rim trading (1017)
mixed signals. usage metrics look healthy but the CSM relationship has been rocky.
they've requested a new CSM twice. their last NPS comment was in mandarin so i 
couldn't read it -- need to get it translated. contract up in may.

3/15 acct 1042 - all good, expanding to APAC team next quarter. 
loves the product. renewal is a formality according to their VP of Eng.

04/08 beacon insurance (acct 1024)
annual check-in. They're regulated so they move slow but steady. renewal 
isn't until Q4. No concerns, just maintaining the relationship.

renewal_risk_reason: delay in response to previous request
raw_note:
4/10 - note for account 1099 (Harbourside Dining I think?)
They called to ask about our GDPR data processing agreement update. Routine
